name: Rahmapfelkuchen (Apple and Rum Custard Cake)
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Mix flour, sugar, and lemon rind.
2. Cut in butter or margarine until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add egg yolk and 1 tablespoon milk; mix gently to form a dough.
4. Pat dough into the bottom of a 10-inch Springform pan with greased sides only.
5. Press dough up the sides of the pan for 1 inch.
Filling:
1. Toss together bread crumbs and melted butter.
2. Spread evenly over pastry crust.
3. Toss apple slices, lemon juice, and 1/4 cup sugar.
4. Spread apples over crumbs.
5. Drain raisins, reserving rum, and sprinkle raisins over apples.
6. Beat eggs and sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
7. Stir in milk and reserved rum.
8. Pour custard over apples.
9. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven for 15 minutes.
10. Continue baking at 350 degrees F for 45 to 60 minutes, or until the custard is set.
11. Cool completely before serving. Do not remove springform pan until cool.
